THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORNER, CHARLA HONG, BALDWIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 920 LEAVENWORTH STREET, UNIT 401, SF, CA $3,040.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,040.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $3,040.00 WHICH REPRESENSTS BACK RENTS OF $2,015.00 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $1,025.00 TOGETHER WITH COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
